expertise: Leads convert at intersection of: just experienced failure with current approach, seen evidence alternative works, path to alternative is short and clear. Journey creates all three sequentially.
Trust builds through consistency (same voice every time), specificity (details only experts know), proof (verifiable outcomes). Generic content destroys trust faster than no content.
